name: Zombie Horde Dominator
short_description: You are the crazy gunman Michael, and you will crush all zombies, whether they are hanging ghosts, jumping corpses, decaying corpses, or butchers, and all will be slaughtered . You will travel through decaying cities, hospitals, squares, and in the end of humanity, you are the end of all zombies
detailed_description: You are the crazy gunman Michael, and you will crush all zombies, whether they are hanging ghosts, decaying corpses, or butchers, and they will all be slaughtered to the ground. You will travel through decaying cities, hospitals, squares, and you are the end of all zombies
about_the_game: You are the crazy gunman Michael, and you will crush all zombies, whether they are hanging ghosts, decaying corpses, or butchers, and they will all be slaughtered to the ground. You will travel through decaying cities, hospitals, squares, and you are the end of all zombies
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Danish*, Ukrainian*, Russian*, Bulgarian*, Hungarian*, Turkish*, Greek*, Norwegian*, Czech*, Japanese*, Polish*, Thai*, Swedish*, Simplified Chinese*, Romanian*, Finnish*, Dutch*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Vietnamese*, Korean*
